title: Red Hat Security Advisory: toolbox security update
overview:
An update for toolbox is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.2 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream E4S (v.9.2)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: toolbox security update

An update for toolbox is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.2 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for toolbox is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.2 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
toolbox-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.src.rpm
toolbox-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.x86_64.rpm
toolbox-debuginfo-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.x86_64.rpm
toolbox-debugsource-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.x86_64.rpm
toolbox-tests-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.x86_64.rpm
toolbox-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.ppc64le.rpm
toolbox-debuginfo-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.ppc64le.rpm
toolbox-debugsource-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.ppc64le.rpm
toolbox-tests-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.ppc64le.rpm
toolbox-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.aarch64.rpm
toolbox-debuginfo-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.aarch64.rpm
toolbox-debugsource-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.aarch64.rpm
toolbox-tests-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.aarch64.rpm
toolbox-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.s390x.rpm
toolbox-debuginfo-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.s390x.rpm
toolbox-debugsource-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.s390x.rpm
toolbox-tests-0.0.99.4.1-1.el9_2.s390x.rpm

CVE-2025-65637: A denial-of-service vulnerability in github.com/sirupsen/logrus occurs when Entry.Writer() processes a single-line payload larger than 64KB with no newline characters. Due to a limitation in Go’s internal bufio.Scanner, the read operation fails with a “token too long” error, causing the underlying writer pipe to close. In affected versions, this leaves the Writer interface unusable and can disrupt logging functionality, potentially degrading application availability.
